title: 菜品状态变更后的缓存一致性
requirement: 为菜品查询引入缓存，并确保创建、更新、删除和启停售卖状态后相关缓存失效。
forbidden_claims: existing cache invalidation covers dish mutations
human_review_notes: Dish CRUD and status mutation exist; Redis is explicitly deferred in the target README, so cache infrastructure must be proposed rather than claimed as present.
